method: Mantel-Haenszel RR, FE, no continuity correction (PRIMARY rare-event)
note: Standard MH handles zero cells; double-zero trials contribute nothing. Anchor Chen 2025 RR 0.84 (0.54-1.32).
tau2=0.000; near-zero heterogeneity so RE~FE. tau2 estimated on 0.5-CC per-study logRR.

method: Mantel-Haenszel OR, FE, no continuity correction

note: No CC needed. Assumes rare events, balanced arms, small effects. 8 non-double-zero trials have arm ratio >=2:1 (Ahrén 2013, Arslanian 2022, Carydias 2022, DeFronzo 2010, Kaku 2019, Seino 2012b, Umpierrez 2014, Zinman 2019) -> Peto assumption questionable there; events so sparse impact minimal.
Conditional-logistic-equivalent; exact conditional likelihood infeasible (recursion blows up on n~8800 trials). No CC.
Exact-ish likelihood, no CC, no zero-cell problem. Variational Bayes fit.
0.5 added to both cells of arms in zero-event trials. Shown to demonstrate CC dependence is negligible here.
